title: Season capstone and next-season phase
summary: Thirty-first structured packet for Eco Explorer. Lane 1 should follow the first expedition wave with a compact season-capstone phase that makes the current field season feel complete, then hand the player cleanly toward the next season without opening a larger quest log or another crowded station board.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the first field-season capstone notebook arc.
execution_order.why_now: The current season has enough route and expedition material to benefit from one authored closure arc before broader expansion.

execution_order.goal: Implement the first season-capstone notebook arc.
execution_order.why_now: The game needs a satisfying chapter finish, not just more adjacent systems.
The capstone should feel like a calm field finale, not a chore ladder.

execution_order.goal: Prepare a compact season archive and next-season handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Once the season closes well, the station needs a quiet way to preserve that progress and point forward.

execution_order.goal: Add a season archive strip and next-season handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The station should acknowledge finished chapters without becoming a dashboard.

execution_order.goal: Review the archive and handoff pass.
execution_order.why_now: Closure only works if it stays compact and readable.
The nursery should support the season loop, but only in a small way.

execution_order.goal: Tie nursery support into the capstone and expedition loop.
execution_order.why_now: This is the cleanest way to connect the new support loop back into the main game shape.
The nursery must remain secondary and calm.

execution_order.goal: Add one calm next-season setup card.
execution_order.why_now: The player should leave the current season with one clear sense of what comes next.

execution_order.goal: Review the full capstone and next-season handoff.
execution_order.why_now: This is the quality gate for whether lane 1 can move forward from the current season cleanly.

guardrails: Do not add a larger quest log or multi-panel chapter dashboard.
Do not open a second fully playable expedition card in this phase.
Keep the field station notebook-like and handheld-readable.
Let nursery support stay secondary and clue-like.
acceptance_focus: The current season feels authored from start to finish.
The station provides chapter closure without becoming a dashboard.
The nursery deepens the loop without dominating it.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-1.md, docs/reports/2026-03-30-season-capstone-and-next-season-phase.md, and this packet. Treat lane 1's next wave as a season-capstone and handoff phase: close the current field season cleanly, archive it gently, tie in one small nursery support layer, and point the player toward the next season without opening a bigger quest shell.
